qa_pairs.question: Which directories support Globus sharing on general-purpose clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: On general-purpose clusters, Globus sharing is enabled in the `/home` directory (except on Rorqual) and on demand for the `/project` directory. It is not enabled in the `/scratch` directory, except on Narval.

qa_pairs.question: Is Globus sharing enabled on the Trillium cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: No, Globus sharing is not enabled on the Trillium cluster.
